text:
Once upon a time, in a small river town hidden by tall trees, there lived a curious goose named Gus. Gus was different from all the other geese in the pond. He always carried a tiny box sealed tightly in his mighty webbed feet. The townsfolk whispered about it.

One morning, Gus woke up with a sneaky feeling. He nibbled on some seeds that weren’t usually his favorite. Then he noticed something strange about the sky—it was lighter.

With wide eyes, he pecked his way towards the peak of the densest oak tree. There, he discovered a peculiar little door. Being curious, Gus pecked at it and flew right through into a sparkling world filled with glitter and twinkling lights.

He landed gracefully, his webbed feet planting him softly onto a field of stars. He had arrived in the Starlight Glade.

From his box, Gus found an enchanted book. Its pages glowed with wisdom. As he flipped through it, he
